title: ICT Trainer |School |Chua Chu Kang
description:
The Services required are set out as follows:

ICT/Enrichment Training (Programme)

Trainer will plan and execute:

Work closely with the HOD/ICT to draw up ICT related programmes for

students and staff.

1. ICT programmes will be tailored according to the Authority’s

objectives and curriculum.

2. Plan and execute comprehensive ICT programme packages to

meet ICT needs for all students.

3. Any other ICT-related training for students and staff, including

the usage of software or hardware.

4. Managing the Authority’s ICT systems, including school

website and social media presence.

5. Support the Authority in all ICT related projects e.g.

photography, videography, video-editing etc.

6. Provide assistance in development and research of ICT

solutions.

7. Ensure students’ attendance & well-being when there are

training scheduled.

ICT Training for Students

Trainer will support the Authority in conducting trainings for students in:

1. Basic operations of the computer, including logging in the

computer and the changing of passwords.

2. Digital literacy skills such as touch typing, usage of Microsoft

Office tools.

3. Coding and computational thinking such as Micro:bit and

Scratch, drone programming and Arduino.

Awareness Programmes for Staff

Trainer will plan and execute short training programmes (for staff) such

as:

1. Use of various Microsoft Office Tools such as Excel,

Powerpoint Live etc

2. Photo and/or video editing

3. Coding (eg. Matata Lab, Micro:bit, Arduino, Html etc)

4. Useful internet resources for Teaching and Learning.

5. Google/Android/Apple apps training. (eg. Google

Classroom/Apple Classroom)

6. Student Learning Space (SLS)

7. Home-Base Learning (HBL) Microsite.

8. Closely assist and work with teachers to improve their ICT

skills.

Other Tasks or Duties

1. Proactively scans the market for the technology trends and

new technology tools that support Teaching and Learning.

2. Provide professional inputs and make recommendations to

HOD ICT and ICT Manager.

3. Support the Authority’s ICT Manager in administrative matters

and data generation if required.

4. Ensure that MOE policies, guidelines and standards are

adhered to.

5. Maintain the Authority’s computer labs to ensure that the lab is

in functional, neat and orderly condition.

6. Work on Authority’s ICT and carry out ICT related duties.

7. In charge of the Authority’s iPad carts, accessories,

programme and any other digital devices, under the

supervision of the ICT Manager.

8. Any other duties and/or tasks assigned by the Authority.
